strengths: Demonstrated proper needle loading and initial suture introduction
Maintained good instrument control during target passes
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the time limit
Did not progress to suture cutting and final completion
May have struggled with knot tying efficiency

drills.name: Mark-to-mark needle path drill
drills.description: Practice 10 passes through both targets before any knot tying to build muscle memory for accurate placement.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task within the time limit

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Practice 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement to improve knot tying speed.
drills.targets_weakness: May have struggled with knot tying efficiency

drills.name: Slit-closure check drill
drills.description: Tighten just enough to close the slit without avulsion, then visually inspect before proceeding to cutting.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not progress to suture cutting and final completion

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your accurate needle placement into faster knot sequences. Work on completing the full task workflow before chasing speed improvements.
